ground_truth.title: Compare NYIM Training classes & certificates
ground_truth.main_content: Compare Classes & Certificates. Which course is right for you? This tool allows you to compare any class or certificate program in our catalogue with the important information you need to make the right decision. The comparison table includes Key Information categories such as: Overview - basic course description and details; Prerequisite - any required experience or knowledge needed before enrolling; Location - where the classes are held, including in-person in NYC or live online; Schedule - class dates, times, and session information; Certification - what credential is awarded upon completion; Free Retake Within 1 Year - policy allowing students to retake the course within one year, with link to class policies; Workbook Included - whether course materials are provided; Financing - payment options and Climb Credit availability; Target Audience - who the course is designed for; What You'll Learn - course objectives and skills covered. Users can add classes or certificates to compare using the search functionality.
